title: UTILITY AND RENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD UTILITY AND RENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help with rent or utilities (electric, gas, and water) and is available once every 24 months as funding allows. Can not assist with eviction prevention. 2424 N Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Varies by service and who have existing housing Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 772-3828 1 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 772-3828 Main phone Main phone (541) 772-3828 ext 1 Social Services Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: ID, proof of income and expenses, and current rental agreement or utility bill AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - DINING ROOM FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - ST ANTHONY EMERGENCY FAMILY SHELTER MATERIAL GOODS - SOCIAL SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - THRIFT STORE MATERIAL GOODS - URBAN REST STOP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD
